item.title: Explainable AI: Leaf-based medicinal plant classification using knowledge distillation
item.description: Citation: MB. Girmay, S. Obeng, and F. Möhrle, “Explainable AI: Leaf-based medicinal plant classification using knowledge distillation”.44. GIL-Jahrestagung, Biodiversität fördern durch digitale Landwirtschaft: Welchen Beitrag leisten KI und Co?, 2024

item.title: Introducing Explainability to Dairy Farming - A Small Case Study
item.description: Citation: MB. Girmay, F. Möhrle, and J. Henningsen. “Introducing Explainability to Dairy Farming - A Small Case Study”. 44. GIL- Jahrestagung, Biodiversität fördern durch digitale Landwirtschaft: Welchen Beitrag leisten KI und Co?, 2024

item.title: Perspectives on Explanation Formats from Two Stakeholder Groups in Germany: Software Providers and Dairy Farmers
item.description: Citation: MB. Girmay, F. Möhrle. “Perspectives on Explanation Formats from Two Stakeholder Groups in Germany: Software Providers and Dairy Farmers”. IJCAI(XAI),2024.
